title: Tiger Vendor Registry listing (v1)
description: One file per module at data/<GitHubOrg>_<GitHubRepo>.json. Thin metadata that points at the module's public repo; the rich description lives in the repo's TIGER.md.

slug.description: Module install slug. For a code module == module.json slug; for a theme == 'theme-' + theme.json key (e.g. theme-grey-mist). Not the repo name.

type.description: Searchable kind label — NON-behavioral. 'theme' = presentation, 'app' = a large feature/product, 'plugin' = a small tweak. Tiger detects real capabilities (theme.json, migrations/) at activation; this is only a directory filter. Optional; defaults to 'plugin' in the index if omitted.

repository.description: PUBLIC GitHub repo. Private repos are rejected.

ref.description: The pinned, reviewed release tag/SHA (what installs).

description.description: One-line summary for the search card.

tiger_md.description: Raw URL of the repo's TIGER.md (the 'View more' modal content).

category.description: Subject-matter DOMAIN (orthogonal to `type`). A theme can still be a Media-domain theme.

license.description: SPDX id or 'Proprietary'. Public code is required; the license may still be proprietary.

pro_url.description: Where to buy the pro tier (if any).

review.description: Set by the tiger-vendor-bot, not the submitter.
